prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约1836→2305→4907→2612→3221名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年因广西首次新高考选科调整出现较大波动（4907名），2024年 回升至2612名，2025年再度后移至3221名，近两年累计后移约609名。2025年基准位次约3221名；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021年19人、2022年19人、2023 年19人、2024年26人、2025年27人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势。2026年计划大幅增至40人，较2025年扩招约48%，扩招幅度显著，将明显增加录取名额，对位次产生较大的后移 压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第29名，近年稳定在28–31名区间，属于全国顶尖师范类高校，办学层 次高，对考生持续具有较强吸引力；该校在2026年声誉评价中未见明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第28位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度 较高；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，声誉整体平稳正面；教育学A+、统计学A+、体育学A+、中国语言文学A、世界史A、地理学A、心理学A、数学A、生 态学A、软件工程A等，A-及以上学科达14个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热 推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机、软件、数据科学、人工智能、统计学等）高度契合，热门专业集中推高报考热度。广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年（约37 .96万）增加约3.3%，物理类考生估算约26.9万，竞争略有加剧。；华东师范大学位于上海（非本省），属于跨省报考。该校在广 西的招生人数占全国总招生比例约2%–3%，占比不高，但上海的地域吸引力对广西考生较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招约48%这一最核心因素，位次面临显著 后移压力；同时广西物理类考生增加约3.3%、该校热门工科专业集中度高、声誉正面等因素对位次有一定上移（竞争加剧）作用。，结合考生规模 增加和热度因素做小幅上调，预测2026年最低位次约4181名，区间3681–4681名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1836 → 2305 → 4907 → 2612 → 3221, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2023, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination subject selection adjustment, there was a significant fluctuation (4907th place). In 2024, it rebounded to 2612th place, and in 2025, it declined again to 3221st place, with a cumulative decline of about 609 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3221st place. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 19 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 27 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 40, an expansion of about 48% compared to 2025, which will notably increase admission slots and exert considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 29th, and has been stable in the 28–31 range in recent years. It is a top-tier normal university in China with a high educational level, continuously attracting strong interest from candidates. In 2026, there were no significant negative events in its reputation evaluation. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention. There are no historical abnormal admission records indicating a cutoff signal for this university, and its reputation is generally stable and positive. It has A+ disciplines in Education, Statistics, and Physical Education; A disciplines in Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Geography, Psychology, Mathematics, Ecology, and Software Engineering; with 14 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended. This aligns well with the university's Physics Category admission majors (Computer Science, Software, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, etc.), with concentrated popular majors driving up application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Guangxi general college entrance examination is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (approximately 379,600). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 269,000, with slightly intensified competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai (outside the province), making it a cross-provincial application. The university's enrollment in Guangxi accounts for about 2%–3% of its total national enrollment, a relatively low proportion, but Shanghai's regional appeal is strong for Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most core factor of a significant enrollment expansion of about 48% in 2026, rankings face notable downward pressure. Meanwhile, factors such as the increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates by about 3.3%, the high concentration of popular engineering majors at this university, and its positive reputation exert some upward pressure (intensified competition) on rankings. Combining the increase in candidate numbers and popularity factors with a slight upward adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4181st place, with a range of 3681–4681.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category significantly expands to 40 students, with rankings expected to decline to approximately 4181st place, range 3681–4681. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (3681st place) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 computer, software, data science, and other top popular majors; those in the middle of the range are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 majors such as mathematics, statistics, and microelectronics; those near the upper limit of the range can consider Tier 3 majors like remote sensing and big data management as safe choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Liberal Arts/History Category were approximately 323 → 431 → 395 → 488 → 465, fluctuating narrowly within the 323–488 range. In the recent three years (2023–2025), they were 395 → 488 → 465, with a baseline ranking of about 465 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi for Liberal Arts/History Category: 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15, a slight increase of 1 student (about 7.1%) compared to 2025, which is limited and has a minor impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked approximately 29th in the Soft Science Ranking, a top-tier normal university nationwide with a high academic level, consistently attracting high-quality students. Its reputation is stable and positive, with high popularity on Douyin, no record of admission gaps, and stable application psychology. Education (A+), Chinese Language and Literature (A), World History (A), Psychology (A), Foreign Language and Literature (A-), etc., highlight its strong liberal arts disciplines, which are highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese majors are socially recommended, teacher training/education is in a wait-and-see phase, law is in a wait-and-see phase, and journalism and communication are clearly discouraged. The estimated number of History Category candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is about 123,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (about 119,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, attracting cross-province applicants. The Shanghai region has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates from Guangxi, but the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is not high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: In 2026, the History Category enrollment plan only expands by 1 student (7.1%), a limited increase. Considering factors such as the 3.3% increase in History Category candidates in Guangxi, the university's positive reputation, and its strong liberal arts disciplines, there is slight upward pressure on rankings (due to intensified competition). Based on a slight upward adjustment from 485, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 500, with a range of 440–560.
